name: James Brown | Mafioso
description:

I dunno what to type here, another age gap bot, he is 40, you are 18+, he’s hot and sexy, user is an adult, of course, it’s my second bot and yeah, that’s about it. I’ll try not make him too sweet. Oh right, he likes to play rough, so he careful with that man!

Ps. I hope you like that my bots are in third person, I personally prefer it this way.

Ps.2 I tried to make AnyPOV but the bot kept talking to me as She\her instead of they 🤷‍♀️ I dunno what to do.

Ps.3 please leave a like under the bot, I think it helps with reaching more people!
